---
output: html_document
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:wght@500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');

body {
  background: #fafafa;
}

.teaching-page {
  max-width: 1080px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 56px 24px 72px;
  font-family: "Inter", sans-serif;
  color: #1f2933;
}

.teaching-hero {
  margin-bottom: 42px;
  padding: 36px 40px;
  border-radius: 30px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f7f1e8 0%, #eef4ff 50%, #ffffff 100%);
  border: 1px solid rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.12);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 45px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
}

.teaching-kicker {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.16em;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #7c5c2e;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.teaching-title {
  font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
  font-size: 3.5rem;
  line-height: 1.05;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0 0 14px;
  color: #111827;
}

.teaching-summary {
  max-width: 900px;
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
  color: #4b5563;
  margin: 0;
}

.teaching-stats {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 18px;
  margin: 28px 0 44px;
}

.stat-card {
  padding: 24px 26px;
  border-radius: 24px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);
  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.28);
  box-shadow: 0 14px 35px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.06);
}

.stat-number {
  font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
  font-size: 2.55rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1;
  color: #111827;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.stat-label {
  font-size: 1.08rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.45;
  color: #4b5563;
}

.section-label {
  font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
  font-size: 2.35rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #111827;
  margin: 42px 0 20px;
}

.teaching-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 24px;
}

.teaching-card {
  position: relative;
  padding: 30px 32px;
  border-radius: 26px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);
  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.28);
  box-shadow: 0 14px 35px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.07);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.teaching-card::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  width: 8px;
  height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #1d4ed8, #60a5fa);
}

.teaching-card.gold::before {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #b08968, #7c5c2e);
}

.teaching-card.teal::before {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #0f766e, #14b8a6);
}

.teaching-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}

.teaching-pill {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 7px 12px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #f3f4f6;
  color: #6b7280;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.teaching-role {
  font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
  font-size: 2.05rem;
  line-height: 1.15;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #111827;
  margin: 0 0 10px;
}

.teaching-place {
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #374151;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.teaching-description {
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  color: #4b5563;
  margin: 0 0 16px;
}

.teaching-list {
  margin: 0;
  padding-left: 1.25rem;
  color: #4b5563;
}

.teaching-list li {
  font-size: 1.22rem;
  line-height: 1.65;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.teaching-tags {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-top: 18px;
}

.teaching-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 7px 11px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #f8fafc;
  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.35);
  color: #475569;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.philosophy-card {
  margin-top: 24px;
  padding: 30px 32px;
  border-radius: 26px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.98), rgba(239,246,255,0.85));
  border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.28);
  box-shadow: 0 14px 35px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.06);
}

.philosophy-title {
  font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif;
  font-size: 2.05rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #111827;
  margin: 0 0 12px;
}

.philosophy-text {
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
  color: #4b5563;
  margin: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 820px) {
  .teaching-page {
    padding: 36px 16px 56px;
  }

  .teaching-hero {
    padding: 28px 24px;
  }

  .teaching-title {
    font-size: 2.65rem;
  }

  .teaching-summary {
    font-size: 1.25rem;
  }

  .teaching-stats {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .teaching-role {
    font-size: 1.85rem;
  }

  .teaching-description,
  .teaching-list li,
  .philosophy-text {
    font-size: 1.12rem;
  }
}
</style>

<main class="teaching-page">

<section class="teaching-hero">
  <div class="teaching-kicker">Teaching Experience</div>
  <h1 class="teaching-title">Teaching</h1>
  <p class="teaching-summary">
    I have more than six years of teaching experience across mathematics, further mathematics,
    statistics, and biomedical science-related subjects. My teaching emphasizes conceptual clarity,
    rigorous problem solving, and individualized academic planning to help students progress toward
    their target universities and dream schools.
  </p>
</section>

<section class="teaching-stats">
  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="stat-number">6+</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Years of teaching and tutoring experience</div>
  </div>

  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="stat-number">2</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Formal teaching years in education organizations and schools</div>
  </div>

  <div class="stat-card">
    <div class="stat-number">A-Level</div>
    <div class="stat-label">Mathematics and Further Mathematics instruction</div>
  </div>
</section>

<h2 class="section-label">Selected Teaching Roles</h2>

<section class="teaching-grid">

  <article class="teaching-card gold">
    <div class="teaching-meta">
      <span class="teaching-pill">Teacher and Lecturer</span>
      <span class="teaching-pill">2026</span>
      <span class="teaching-pill">High School Students</span>
    </div>

    <h2 class="teaching-role">Shanghai United International School Hefei Campus</h2>

    <div class="teaching-place">
      Hefei, China · International Advanced Level Mathematics and Further Mathematics
    </div>

    <p class="teaching-description">
      I taught high school students in an international curriculum setting, with a focus on building
      the mathematical maturity, examination strategy, and academic confidence required for competitive
      university applications.
    </p>

    <ul class="teaching-list">
      <li>Delivered structured lessons in International Advanced Level Mathematics and Further Mathematics.</li>
      <li>Guided students through core concepts, advanced problem-solving methods, and examination preparation.</li>
      <li>Supported students in strengthening academic profiles for applications to their target universities and dream schools.</li>
      <li>Combined rigorous mathematical training with individualized feedback and learning strategy adjustment.</li>
    </ul>

    <div class="teaching-tags">
      <span class="teaching-tag">A-Level Mathematics</span>
      <span class="teaching-tag">Further Mathematics</span>
      <span class="teaching-tag">High School Education</span>
      <span class="teaching-tag">University Preparation</span>
    </div>
  </article>

  <article class="teaching-card teal">
    <div class="teaching-meta">
      <span class="teaching-pill">Instructor / Tutor</span>
      <span class="teaching-pill">2023</span>
      <span class="teaching-pill">Education Organization</span>
    </div>

    <h2 class="teaching-role">New Channel Education Organization</h2>

    <div class="teaching-place">
      Academic Tutoring · Mathematics and Quantitative Training
    </div>

    <p class="teaching-description">
      I worked with students in a professional education organization, helping them develop stronger
      foundations in mathematics and quantitative reasoning. This experience strengthened my ability
      to diagnose learning gaps, explain abstract concepts clearly, and adapt teaching strategies to
      students with different academic backgrounds.
    </p>

    <ul class="teaching-list">
      <li>Provided targeted instruction to improve students’ mathematical reasoning and problem-solving skills.</li>
      <li>Designed explanations and practice structures based on each student’s weaknesses and academic goals.</li>
      <li>Helped students build disciplined study habits, examination techniques, and long-term learning confidence.</li>
    </ul>

    <div class="teaching-tags">
      <span class="teaching-tag">Tutoring</span>
      <span class="teaching-tag">Mathematics</span>
      <span class="teaching-tag">Quantitative Reasoning</span>
      <span class="teaching-tag">Student Mentorship</span>
    </div>
  </article>

  <article class="teaching-card">
    <div class="teaching-meta">
      <span class="teaching-pill">Teaching Assistant</span>
      <span class="teaching-pill">Sep. 2024 – Dec. 2024</span>
      <span class="teaching-pill">Columbia University</span>
    </div>

    <h2 class="teaching-role">Graduate Teaching Assistant</h2>

    <div class="teaching-place">
      Department of Biostatistics and Columbia University
    </div>

    <p class="teaching-description">
      During my graduate training at Columbia University, I also served as a teaching assistant in
      probability and toxicology-related coursework. These roles expanded my teaching experience from
      high school instruction to university-level academic support.
    </p>

    <ul class="teaching-list">
      <li>Assisted first-year biostatistics students with probability coursework, assignments, and conceptual questions.</li>
      <li>Supported introductory teaching and grading for Fundamentals of Toxicology for health-related disciplines.</li>
      <li>Developed experience explaining statistical and biomedical concepts to students from diverse backgrounds.</li>
    </ul>

    <div class="teaching-tags">
      <span class="teaching-tag">Probability</span>
      <span class="teaching-tag">Biostatistics</span>
      <span class="teaching-tag">Toxicology</span>
      <span class="teaching-tag">Graduate TA</span>
    </div>
  </article>

</section>

<section class="philosophy-card">
  <h2 class="philosophy-title">Teaching Philosophy</h2>
  <p class="philosophy-text">
    My teaching philosophy is to make difficult material intellectually accessible without reducing its rigor.
    I aim to help students understand not only how to solve a problem, but why a method works, when it should be used,
    and how it connects to broader academic goals. For high school students, this means combining content mastery,
    examination strategy, and long-term mentoring so that they can move toward their dream schools with confidence.
  </p>
</section>

</main>
```
